name: FabricCatalystPipelineDeploy
description: Creates a Fabric deployment pipeline and assigns workspaces to its stages. Run this once after all target workspaces have been provisioned by FabricCatalyst Auto Deployment.
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection with access to the Fabric tenant. Used to obtain tokens for the Fabric and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: deploymentPipelinePrefix
inputs.label: Deployment Pipeline Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name for the Fabric deployment pipeline. A 'pl_' prefix is added automatically, e.g. 'MyProduct' produces 'pl_MyProduct'.

inputs.name: pipelineAdminsList
inputs.label: Pipeline Administrators
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Pipeline Admin role. Leave empty to skip.

inputs.name: workspacePrefix
inputs.label: Workspace Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix used to resolve workspace names. Must match the prefix used in the Auto Deployment task, e.g. 'MyProduct' resolves to 'ws_MyProduct_dev'.

inputs.name: environmentList
inputs.label: Environments
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON array of all environments in pipeline stage order. Each entry requires 'code' and 'order'. Must contain at least 2 entries. Example: [{"code":"dev","order":1},{"code":"uat","order":2},{"code":"prod","order":3}]

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log. Use for troubleshooting only.
